case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS MCGEE, RICHARD A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,852.50 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF SOCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MCGEE, RICHARD A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-1995 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
